Home / Blog / How Much Does It Cost to Register a Trademark in China?

How Much Does It Cost to Register a Trademark in China?

Complete guide to China trademark registration costs. Official CNIPA fees, agent costs, hidden expenses, and budget planning. Transparent pricing from RTMCN.

📋 Complete Cost Breakdown

Official CNIPA Fees

Basic Filing Fee:

  • ¥300 per class (up to 10 items)
  • ¥30 per additional item (over 10)
  • ¥150 priority claim fee

Examples:

Single class, 10 items: ¥300
Single class, 15 items: ¥450
Two classes, 10 items each: ¥600

Professional Agent Fees

RTMCN's Pricing:

  • ¥1,500 standard service per class
  • ¥2,500 premium service per class
  • ✓ Comprehensive search included
  • ✓ Full application management
  • ✓ No hidden fees

Total Cost Examples:

Single class (RTMCN): ¥1,800 ()
Two classes (RTMCN): ¥3,600 ()
Three classes (RTMCN): ¥5,400 ()

💎 RTMCN's Transparent Pricing

Standard Package

¥1,800 per class
  • ✓ Comprehensive search
  • ✓ Classification analysis
  • ✓ Full application management
  • ✓ Status monitoring
Most Popular

Premium Package

¥2,800 per class
  • ✓ Everything in Standard
  • ✓ Priority processing
  • ✓ Opposition defense
  • ✓ Renewal management

Enterprise Package

Custom
  • ✓ Volume discounts
  • ✓ Dedicated account manager
  • ✓ Portfolio optimization
